data.body: Today, April 15, is Lewis Williams’ 174th Birthday! Without Lewis Williams there would be no Cohasset Punch. According to a 1902 issue of “Bonfort’s Wine & Spirit Circular,” Williams had a few years prior visited actor William H. Crane, a family friend, at his estate in Cohasset, Massachusetts.
data.author: did:plc:numjg7c2so5f2z35gi63jyrl

data.body: Lewis Williams retired in 1916 and died in 1935, and though we have not located any photos of him, greatness apparently ran in the family — Williams’ grandson was noted Formula One driver and racing instructor Robert Lewis “Bob” Bondurant (1933–2021).
